description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and publish using the clickable/ci-16.04-arm64 Docker image. In the build stage add a build job that runs "clickable build --clean", stores the resulting *.click files under build/*/app/ as artifacts that expire in one week, and only runs when the commit is not a tag (CI_COMMIT_TAG is null). In the publish stage add a publish job that runs "clickable build --clean" then "clickable publish \"$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE\"", keeps the same artifact configuration, and only runs when a tag is present (CI_COMMIT_TAG).
